aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The cosmos are quiet, but your confidence is not. Classic Aries move.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are unusually silent for you today. This is suspicious. You will ship anyway. This is also suspicious.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — A quiet cosmos suggests a quiet day. Deploy disturbs the peace. You are Taurus. You will not disturb the peace.
taurus.prophecy: The stars offer stillness. You were already not going to touch anything. Stillness accepted.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — One half of you says ship it. The other half says revert. The tab count is up to 47.
gemini.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. This is the most unsettling thing that has ever happened to you. You open a new tab. Then another.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — Something feels off. You cannot explain it. The logs also cannot explain it. Trust the feeling.
cancer.prophecy: The cosmos offer silence. This worries you deeply. You check the monitoring dashboard. You check it again. You add an alert.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — Nothing will stop you. The pipeline will try. The pipeline will fail. You will deploy anyway.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You decide this means all eyes are secretly on you. You are not entirely wrong.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: No — You found three things to refactor while reading the deploy checklist. You are not ready. You are never ready.
virgo.prophecy: The cosmos offer no guidance. You write your own. It is a 47-point checklist. Item 3 has a sub-checklist.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — You have been weighing the pros and cons for 3 hours. The deploy window is closing. You are still weighing.
libra.prophecy: The stars offer balance. You spend 45 minutes choosing between two identical font sizes. Balance achieved.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — You have read the PR three times. Something is wrong. You can feel it. You do not know what it is yet.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You do not trust quiet. You check the git blame. You check it very carefully.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — You already pushed. You are reading this after the fact. Godspeed.
sagittarius.prophecy: The cosmos suggest a quiet day of reflection. You schedule three meetings, open two new tickets, and refactor something nobody asked you to refactor.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — It is on the roadmap. It has always been on the roadmap. You will complete the roadmap.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. Your Jira board is not. Your Jira board never is. You add another ticket anyway.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — You have already automated the decision. The script says maybe. You trust the script.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You interpret this as permission to rewrite everything in a framework nobody asked for.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — You were going to, but got distracted by a Stack Overflow thread from 2014. It's fine. It's really fine.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet and so are you. You stare at the code. The code stares back. No one moves. It's peaceful, actually.
